metadata.description: 46 battle-tested product management skills for Claude Code — install individually or as a bundle.

plugins.name: pm-skills-bundle
plugins.description: All 46 PM skills at once — discovery, strategy, finance, career, and more.

plugins.name: acquisition-channel-advisor
plugins.description: Evaluate acquisition channels using unit economics, customer quality, and scalability. Use when deciding whether to scale, test, or kill a growth channel.

plugins.name: ai-shaped-readiness-advisor
plugins.description: Assess whether your product work is AI-first or AI-shaped. Use when evaluating AI maturity and choosing the next team capability to build.

plugins.name: altitude-horizon-framework
plugins.description: Understand the PM-to-Director transition through altitude and horizon thinking. Use when diagnosing scope, time-horizon, or leadership-level gaps.

plugins.name: business-health-diagnostic
plugins.description: Diagnose SaaS business health across growth, retention, efficiency, and capital. Use when preparing a business review or prioritizing urgent fixes.

plugins.name: company-research
plugins.description: Create a company research brief with executive quotes, product strategy, and org context. Use when preparing for interviews, competitive analysis, partnerships, or market-entry work.

plugins.name: context-engineering-advisor
plugins.description: Diagnose context stuffing vs. context engineering. Use when an AI workflow feels bloated, brittle, or hard to steer reliably.

plugins.name: customer-journey-map
plugins.description: Create a customer journey map across stages, touchpoints, actions, emotions, and metrics. Use when diagnosing a broken experience or aligning a team on the full customer flow.

plugins.name: customer-journey-mapping-workshop
plugins.description: Run a customer journey mapping workshop with adaptive questions and outputs. Use when you need to map stages, actions, emotions, pain points, and opportunities for a persona and scenario.

plugins.name: director-readiness-advisor
plugins.description: Guide the PM-to-Director transition across preparing, interviewing, landing, and recalibrating. Use when leadership scope is changing and you need practical coaching.

plugins.name: discovery-interview-prep
plugins.description: Plan customer discovery interviews with the right goal, segment, constraints, and method. Use when preparing interviews for problem validation, churn research, or new product ideas.

plugins.name: discovery-process
plugins.description: Run a full discovery cycle from problem hypothesis to validated solution. Use when a team needs a structured path through framing, interviews, synthesis, and experiments.

plugins.name: eol-message
plugins.description: Write a clear, empathetic EOL announcement with rationale, customer impact, and next steps. Use when retiring a product, feature, or plan without creating avoidable confusion.

plugins.name: epic-breakdown-advisor
plugins.description: Break down epics into user stories with Humanizing Work split patterns. Use when a backlog item is too large to estimate, sequence, or deliver safely.

plugins.name: epic-hypothesis
plugins.description: Frame an epic as a testable hypothesis with target user, expected outcome, and validation method. Use when defining a major initiative before roadmap, discovery, or delivery planning.

plugins.name: executive-onboarding-playbook
plugins.description: Plan a VP or CPO 30-60-90 day diagnostic onboarding path. Use when entering a new executive product role and avoiding premature change.

plugins.name: feature-investment-advisor
plugins.description: Evaluate feature investments using revenue impact, cost structure, ROI, and strategy. Use when deciding whether a feature deserves investment.

plugins.name: finance-based-pricing-advisor
plugins.description: Evaluate pricing changes using ARPU, conversion, churn risk, NRR, and payback. Use when deciding whether a pricing move should ship.

plugins.name: finance-metrics-quickref
plugins.description: Look up SaaS finance metrics, formulas, and benchmarks fast. Use when you need a quick metric definition, formula, or benchmark during analysis.

plugins.name: jobs-to-be-done
plugins.description: Uncover customer jobs, pains, and gains in a structured JTBD format. Use when clarifying unmet needs, repositioning a product, or improving discovery and messaging.

plugins.name: lean-ux-canvas
plugins.description: Guide teams through Lean UX Canvas v2. Use when framing a business problem, surfacing assumptions, and defining what to learn next.

plugins.name: opportunity-solution-tree
plugins.description: Build an Opportunity Solution Tree from outcomes to opportunities, solutions, and tests. Use when a stakeholder request needs problem framing before you decide what to build.

plugins.name: pestel-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze political, economic, social, technological, environmental, and legal forces. Use when external market shifts could materially affect a product, roadmap, or strategy.

plugins.name: pol-probe-advisor
plugins.description: Select the right Proof of Life (PoL) probe based on hypothesis, risk, and resources. Use this to match the validation method to the real learning goal, not tooling comfort.

plugins.name: pol-probe
plugins.description: Define a Proof of Life probe to test a risky hypothesis cheaply. Use when you need harsh truth before building real product.

plugins.name: positioning-statement
plugins.description: Create a Geoffrey Moore-style positioning statement. Use when clarifying who you serve, what problem you solve, your category, and why you're different from alternatives.

plugins.name: positioning-workshop
plugins.description: Run a positioning workshop that surfaces target customer, unmet need, category, benefits, and differentiation. Use when your product messaging feels fuzzy, generic, or misaligned.

plugins.name: prd-development
plugins.description: Build a structured PRD that connects problem, users, solution, and success criteria. Use when turning discovery notes into an engineering-ready document for a major initiative.

plugins.name: press-release
plugins.description: Write an Amazon-style press release that defines customer value before building. Use when aligning stakeholders on a new product, feature, or strategic bet.

plugins.name: prioritization-advisor
plugins.description: Choose a prioritization framework based on stage, team context, and stakeholder needs. Use when deciding between RICE, ICE, value/effort, or another scoring approach.

plugins.name: problem-framing-canvas
plugins.description: Guide teams through MITRE's Problem Framing Canvas. Use when you need a clearer problem statement before jumping to solutions.

plugins.name: problem-statement
plugins.description: Write a user-centered problem statement with who is blocked, what they are trying to do, why it matters, and how it feels. Use when framing discovery, prioritization, or a PRD.

plugins.name: product-strategy-session
plugins.description: Run an end-to-end product strategy session across positioning, discovery, and roadmap planning. Use when a team needs validated direction before committing to execution.

plugins.name: proto-persona
plugins.description: Create a proto-persona from current research, market signals, and team knowledge. Use when you need a working customer profile before deeper validation.

plugins.name: recommendation-canvas
plugins.description: Evaluate an AI product idea across outcomes, hypotheses, risks, and positioning. Use when deciding whether an AI solution deserves investment or recommendation.

plugins.name: roadmap-planning
plugins.description: Plan a strategic roadmap across prioritization, epic definition, stakeholder alignment, and sequencing. Use when turning strategy into a release plan that teams can execute.

plugins.name: saas-economics-efficiency-metrics
plugins.description: Evaluate SaaS unit economics and capital efficiency. Use when deciding whether the business can scale efficiently or needs correction.

plugins.name: saas-revenue-growth-metrics
plugins.description: Calculate SaaS revenue, retention, and growth metrics. Use when diagnosing momentum, churn, expansion, or product-market-fit signals.

plugins.name: skill-authoring-workflow
plugins.description: Turn raw PM content into a compliant, publish-ready skill. Use when creating or updating a repo skill without breaking standards.

plugins.name: storyboard
plugins.description: Create a six-frame storyboard that shows a user's journey from problem to solution. Use when you need a fast narrative for alignment, concept reviews, or demos.

plugins.name: tam-sam-som-calculator
plugins.description: Calculate TAM, SAM, and SOM with explicit assumptions, methods, and caveats. Use when sizing a market for a product idea, business case, or executive review.

plugins.name: user-story-mapping-workshop
plugins.description: Run a user story mapping workshop with adaptive questions and a structured map output. Use when you need backbone activities, tasks, and release slices for a workflow.

plugins.name: user-story-mapping
plugins.description: Create a user story map that lays out activities, steps, tasks, and release slices. Use when planning a workflow, backlog, or MVP around the user journey.

plugins.name: user-story-splitting
plugins.description: Break a large story or epic into smaller deliverable stories using proven split patterns. Use when backlog items are too big for estimation, sequencing, or independent release.

plugins.name: user-story
plugins.description: Create user stories with Mike Cohn format and Gherkin acceptance criteria. Use when turning user needs into development-ready work with clear outcomes and testable conditions.

plugins.name: vp-cpo-readiness-advisor
plugins.description: Guide the transition to VP or CPO across preparing, interviewing, landing, and recalibrating. Use when executive product scope is changing fast.

plugins.name: workshop-facilitation
plugins.description: Facilitate workshop sessions in a one-step, multi-turn flow. Use when an interactive skill needs consistent pacing, options, and progress tracking.
